description_long: This lamp features a modern, industrial design with a central vertical rod that branches into two horizontal arms, each supporting a downward-facing light fixture. The fixtures are adorned with radial, spiked shades that appear to be made of metal, giving the lamp a striking, mechanical aesthetic. The shades have a dark, possibly bronze or black finish, with visible metallic highlights that add to the visual complexity. The lamp is designed to be mounted from the ceiling, with the central rod serving as the suspension point. The overall structure is symmetrical, with the two light sources positioned at the ends of the arms, providing balanced illumination. The lamp's construction suggests durability and a focus on both function and decorative appeal, making it suitable for urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A modern, industrial-style ceiling lamp with two spiked metal shades on branching arms, finished in dark metallic tones. The design is symmetrical and visually striking, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing both spiked metal shades and the central suspension rod, highlighting the lamp's symmetrical, branching structure.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the linear arrangement of the central rod and one of the spiked shades, with the other shade partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing both shades and the central rod, emphasizing the lamp's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the same linear arrangement with the other shade in focus.
